docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED APR-22-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABERCROMBIE, RUFUS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,500.00 FILED BY PERL, MENACHEM MENDEL AS TO DEFENDANT ABERCROMBIE, RUFUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MENACHEM MENDEL PERL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUFUS ABERCROMBIE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERL, MENACHEM MENDEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABERCROMBIE, RUFUS $9,008.47 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,133.47, COST OF REPAIR $7508.47. LOSS OF USE OF VEHICLE: $1500 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
